---
title: ""
format:
  typst:
    filters:
      - filters/layout.lua
    template-partials:
      - page.typ
    papersize: a4
    margin:
      x: 8mm
      y: 8mm
    mainfont: "DejaVu Sans"
    fontsize: 9.6pt
    columns: 2
---

```{=typst}
#set document(title: "Les Kitchen Facts")
#let ink = rgb("#263238")
#let copper = rgb("#b65f32")
#let teal = rgb("#1f6f68")
#let sage = rgb("#eef4e8")
#let cream = rgb("#fff8ed")
#let flour = rgb("#fffdf8")

#set text(font: "DejaVu Sans", size: 9.6pt, lang: "fr", fill: ink)
#set par(justify: false, leading: 0.52em)
#set table(
  inset: (x: 4.6pt, y: 3.4pt),
  stroke: 0.25pt + rgb("#dcc9b3"),
)

#show heading.where(level: 1): it => block(
  above: 5.6pt,
  below: 3.4pt,
  width: 100%,
  fill: teal,
  inset: (x: 6.6pt, y: 4.2pt),
  radius: 2pt,
)[
  #text(fill: white, weight: "bold", size: 11.4pt)[#it.body]
]

#show heading.where(level: 2): it => block(
  above: 2pt,
  below: 1pt,
)[#text(fill: teal, weight: "bold", size: 9pt)[#it.body]]

#show table.cell.where(y: 0): it => table.cell(
  fill: sage,
  inset: (x: 4.6pt, y: 3.4pt),
)[#text(fill: ink, weight: "bold")[#it.body]]

#show table: it => block(
  fill: cream,
  stroke: 0.45pt + rgb("#e3d4c2"),
  radius: 2pt,
  inset: 2.4pt,
  width: 100%,
  above: 2pt,
  below: 5pt,
)[#it]
```

{{< include facts_fr.md >}}
